infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: GateSync uses speech recognition when a guard taps the mic on visitor entry to convert spoken names into text faster at the gate.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GateSync uses the microphone when a guard taps the mic button on visitor entry, for example saying 'Ramesh Kumar' to fill the visitor name field.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GateSync uses your photo library so residents can attach issue proof images in Helpdesk tickets, for example adding a photo of a water leakage or electrical fault.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: GateSync saves generated visitor pass images to your Photos only when you choose to save or share them.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow GateSync guard devices to scan visitor QR passes and capture photos.

plugins.microphonePermission: GateSync uses the microphone when a guard taps the mic button on visitor entry, for example saying 'Ramesh Kumar' to fill the visitor name field.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: GateSync uses speech recognition when a guard taps the mic on visitor entry to convert spoken names into text faster at the gate.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow GateSync to capture visitor photos and attach complaint images.
plugins.photosPermission: GateSync uses your photo library so residents can attach issue proof images in Helpdesk tickets, for example adding a photo of a water leakage or electrical fault.

plugins.contactsPermission: GateSync uses contacts only when a resident chooses 'Pick from contacts' while creating a visitor pass, for example selecting a guest name and phone number.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow GateSync to use Face ID to unlock your session on this device.
